name: Girls' Frontline
original_name: 少女前线 人形小剧场
overview: After the Third World War in 206x AD, the world has been devastated, the tactical dolls of the private military company Griffin are in an endless battle with the “Iron-Blood Construction Company,” which deceived mankind.

trailers.title: 소녀전선 애니 소식 / ドールズフロントラインアニメのニュース
